description: Cheap unguarded canary for the local Dockerized stack. Probes representative RPC, indexer, API, and UI endpoints so a down local stack becomes an explicit functionality failure instead of being masked as guarded-check staleness.

services.name: hardhat rpc
services.recoveryHint: Run ./scripts/services.sh --start, then ./scripts/services.sh --status. If Hardhat is still down, inspect the hardhat service logs with docker compose logs hardhat.

services.name: indexer graphql
services.recoveryHint: Run ./scripts/services.sh --start, then ./scripts/services.sh --status. If the indexer is still down or stuck, inspect docker compose logs indexer.

services.name: platform api health
services.recoveryHint: Run ./scripts/services.sh --start, then ./scripts/services.sh --status. If platform-api is still down, inspect docker compose logs platform-api.

services.name: ui shell
services.recoveryHint: Run ./scripts/services.sh --start, then ./scripts/services.sh --status. If the UI is still down, inspect docker compose logs ui.
